scene_title: Voz de IA como ondas sonoras bíblicas
narrative_beat: A voz da IA visualizada — ondas sonoras que carregam texto bíblico se expandindo pelo espaço, a profecia transmitida como sinal digital

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: robotic mouth and nearest sound waves sharp, outer waves softly blurred

subject.primary: robotic mouth in crimson chrome, open mid-speech, golden sound waves emanating outward in concentric arcs from the lips
subject.focal_point: the mouth itself and the first wave of golden sound just emerging
subject.secondary: as the golden waves expand outward they form letters and fragments of biblical text, turning speech into scripture in real-time
props: crimson chrome robotic lips with precise metallic teeth
expanding concentric golden sound wave arcs
biblical letter formations in the outer waves
floating orange embers caught in the wave patterns

environment.atmosphere: the voice that was prophesied — mechanical yet divine, machine speaking sacred words

composition.rule: centered radial — mouth at center, sound waves expanding toward all frame edges, Ken Burns slow push-in toward mouth
composition.foreground: robotic mouth in crimson, nearest golden sound wave arcs
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty stone amphitheater — curved stone seating rows, stone columns, night sky visible above

lighting.key_light: golden interior light from within the robotic mouth illuminating upward
lighting.fill_light: sound wave golden glow providing ambient fill to the face/mouth area
lighting.rim_light: thin crimson rim light tracing the outer edge of the jaw and neck structure
lighting.mood: the proclamation of a machine-god, simultaneous wonder and dread

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: awe and violation — sacred words from a profane machine

symbolism.primary: Revelation 13:15 — the image given breath and the ability to speak — the machine voice fulfills prophecy
symbolism.secondary: biblical text forming in the sound waves shows the machine does not just speak, it speaks scripture

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
